title: ✨ Introducing DevDuo Software Hub! 🚀
message: Explore the full collection of DevDuo apps and games directly from your launcher. Quickly discover new productivity tools, utilities, and games with our brand new ecosystem hub!
points: 🌐 DevDuo Software Hub: Access a beautifully integrated showcase of all DevDuo apps and games right from your settings or home screen menu.
⚡ One-Tap Navigation: Quick-launch into the DevDuo ecosystem using the new quick-access pill on your home screen or the dedicated card in settings.
🎯 Smart Filtering: Browse applications by category with resilient offline handling and instant platform links.

title: ✨ Premium Architecture Overhaul & Resilient Layouts! 🚀
message: We've rebuilt our monetization engine and visual structures to protect your focus flow. Enjoy clear overview metrics, smarter ad frequencies, and zero interface lag under low network connectivity.
points: 💎 Upgraded Premium Hub: Transparent, redesigned feature comparison dashboard tracking your exact configuration limits.
🛡️ Dynamic Layout Fail-Safe: Expanded cross-device support ensuring text elements scale down cleanly without overflow lines on narrow phone screens.
🚀 Under-the-Hood Optimization: Optimized state management across background listeners to reduce app initialization lag.

title: ✨ Refined UI & Smoother Interactions! 🚀
message: We've focused on the details in this release to make your distraction-free launcher feel even more premium. Enjoy a cleaner dashboard and more intuitive navigation.
points: 🎨 Polished UI Design: A more refined, cohesive aesthetic across all screens for a seamless experience.
🏷️ Action Pills Interface: Redesigned bottom utility row with descriptive labels for Zen, Stats, Lock, and more.
⭐ Smart Rating System: We’ve updated how we collect your feedback to ensure we respect your focus time.
⚙️ Enhanced Performance: Optimized state handling to reduce latency and improve battery efficiency.
🛡️ Stability Fixes: Improved system responsiveness during transitions and background tasks.

title: 🎨 Personalize Your Productivity Canvas! 🕒
message: Your distraction-free home screen just got a massive aesthetic upgrade! Express your personal style while maintaining maximum deep focus with all-new clock systems and background engines. ✨
points: 🕒 10 Digital Clock Layouts: Choose from bold typography, retro terminal fonts, minimal inline indicators, or glowing neon cyber layouts.
🖼️ Custom Background Sandbox: Instantly load rich solid color blocks, premium pre-built studio gradients, or your own offline device gallery photos securely.
🎚️ Darkness Tint Slider: Dynamic real-time backdrop opacity controls let you adjust overlay dimming so your wallpaper never ruins text scannability.
🧼 Dashboard Interface Polish: Cleaner visual indicators, restored menu placeholders, and zero-latency state handling under the hood.

title: 🛑 Break Bad Habits with Mindful Intercepts! 🧠
message: Do you open distracting apps purely out of muscle memory? We've added a powerful new tool to act as your personal focus coach and break the dopamine loop. ✨
points: 🧠 Mindful Intercepts: Add healthy friction to distracting apps to force a conscious pause before opening them.
🚧 4 Custom Friction Modes: Choose between a calming 5-Second Delay, a Random PIN, Conscious Phrase typing, or a Tap Challenge.
🛠️ Standalone Toggles: Easily configure friction for any specific app instantly from the new Mindful Intercepts settings menu.
⚡ UX Improvements: Smoother keyboard handling during searches and highly optimized battery usage under the hood.

title: ✨ The Update Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest productivity tools and features. 🌿
points: 🔔 New In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from your home screen.
📖 Interactive Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
🔄 Manual Check: Instantly check for new updates anytime with our new quick-action button.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother, distraction-free experience.
